hero.subtitle: Join the premium fitness experience. Certified trainers, state-of-the-art equipment, and a community that pushes you further.

about.description: At 26fitnessClub, we believe in pushing boundaries. Our premium facility offers everything you need to transform your body and mind in an aesthetic, mood-lit environment.

programs.title: Nutrition Consulting
programs.description: Nutrition consulting is a professional service where experts provide personalized dietary guidance and meal planning to help individuals reach specific health, weight loss, or performance goals.

programs.title: Youth Sports
programs.description: Youth sports are organized athletic programs that provide children and adolescents the opportunity to develop physical skills, teamwork, and sportsmanship through competitive or recreational play.

programs.title: Cycling
programs.description: Cycling is a low-impact cardiovascular exercise that uses a bicycle to improve leg strength, endurance, and heart health through rhythmic pedaling

programs.title: Zumba
programs.description: Zumba is a high-energy fitness program that blends Latin and international music with dance choreography for a total-body cardio workout that feels more like a party than exercise.

programs.title: Personal Training
programs.description: Personal training is a one-on-one fitness service where a certified professional designs tailored workout programs and provides real-time coaching to help you reach specific physical goals safely and efficiently.

programs.title: Weight Training
programs.description: Weight training is a form of physical exercise using resistance, such as dumbbells, barbells, or machines, to contract muscles and build overall strength, bone density, and lean muscle mass.

videoGallery.title: Beast Mode: Full Body Workout
videoGallery.description: Follow along with Elite Trainer Marcus for a high-intensity full body smash session.

videoGallery.title: Advanced HIIT Cardio
videoGallery.description: Burn maximum calories in minimum time with this intense 20-minute guided cardio routine.

videoGallery.title: Master the Deadlift
videoGallery.description: Learn the perfect form to prevent injury and lift heavier in this detailed tutorial.

videoGallery.title: 10-Minute Core Crunch
videoGallery.description: A quick, equipment-free core routine you can do anywhere to build functional strength.
